attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	SCA.POS_SCAAC_KEY ,
	SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
	POS_TRX.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT ,
	POS_TRX.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT  ,
	POS_TRX.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	POS_TRX.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT  AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT      ,
	PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ,
	PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
	SK3_SC_ID_INT AS SC_ID_INT,	
	SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM ,
	SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
	SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	SALES_CREDIT_START_DTM AS START_TV_DTM,
	EXPIRATION_DTM AS END_TV_DTM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
	POS_TRX.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY   ,
	SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
	COALESCE( POS_LN.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE( POS_LN.POS_RETURN_ROLE,'=') AS POS_RETURN_ROLE
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, POS_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, POS_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, POS_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, POS_TRX.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV SCA
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV POS_TRX
ON SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_LN /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
ON POS_LN.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
WHERE SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM >'$$LastExtractDate'
AND SCA.START_TV_DTM >'$$LastExtractDate'
AND COALESCE(SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    ,'N') = 'N' 
AND PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = 'L'
AND SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT BETWEEN POS_TRX.START_TV_DT AND POS_TRX.END_TV_DT

UNION

SELECT 
	SCA.POS_SCAAC_KEY ,
	SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
	POS_TRX.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT ,
	POS_TRX.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT  ,
	POS_TRX.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	POS_TRX.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT  AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT         ,
	PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ,
	PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
	SK3_SC_ID_INT AS SC_ID_INT,
	SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM ,
	SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
	SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	SALES_CREDIT_START_DTM AS START_TV_DTM,
	EXPIRATION_DTM AS END_TV_DTM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG ,
	POS_TRX.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY   ,
	SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
	COALESCE( POS_LN.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE( POS_LN.POS_RETURN_ROLE,'=') AS POS_RETURN_ROLE
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/		  
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, POS_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, POS_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, POS_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, POS_TRX.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV SCA
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV POS_TRX
ON SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_LN /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
ON POS_LN.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
WHERE SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM >'$$LastExtractDate'
AND SCA.START_TV_DTM >'$$LastExtractDate'
AND SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y'
AND PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = 'L'
AND SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT BETWEEN POS_TRX.START_TV_DT AND POS_TRX.END_TV_DT

UNION
 
SELECT 
	SCA.POS_SCAAC_KEY ,
	SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
	POS_TRX.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT ,
	POS_TRX.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT  ,
	POS_TRX.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	POS_TRX.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT  AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT      ,
	PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ,
	PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
	SK3_SC_ID_INT AS SC_ID_INT,
	SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM ,
	SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
	SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	SALES_CREDIT_START_DTM AS START_TV_DTM,
	EXPIRATION_DTM AS END_TV_DTM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
	POS_TRX.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,
	SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
    /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
	COALESCE( POS_LN.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE( POS_LN.POS_RETURN_ROLE,'=') AS POS_RETURN_ROLE
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/			
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, POS_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, POS_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, POS_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, POS_TRX.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV SCA
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV POS_TRX
ON SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_LN /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
ON POS_LN.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
WHERE SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SEL LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_POS_SCA_INCR_SC' ) 
AND SCA.START_TV_DTM <= '$$LastExtractDate'
AND SCA.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = 'L'
AND (COALESCE(SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    ,'N') = 'N' OR  SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y') /* ADDED AS A PART OF HANDLING SOURCE COMMIT ISSUE */
AND SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT BETWEEN POS_TRX.START_TV_DT AND POS_TRX.END_TV_DT
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS N_DRVD 
                 WHERE N_DRVD.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT = SCA.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT 
				  AND DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y'
				  AND N_DRVD.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT <> - 999)

UNION

SELECT 
	SCA.POS_SCAAC_KEY ,
	SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
	POS_TRX.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT ,
	POS_TRX.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT  ,
	POS_TRX.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	POS_TRX.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT  AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT      ,
	PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ,
	PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
	SK3_SC_ID_INT AS SC_ID_INT,
	SCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM ,
	SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
	SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	SALES_CREDIT_START_DTM AS START_TV_DTM,
	EXPIRATION_DTM AS END_TV_DTM,
	DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG ,
	POS_TRX.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY ,
	SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
	COALESCE( POS_LN.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE( POS_LN.POS_RETURN_ROLE,'=') AS POS_RETURN_ROLE
	/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	   
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,POS_LN.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, POS_TRX.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, POS_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, POS_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, POS_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, POS_TRX.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV SCA
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV POS_TRX
ON SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_LN /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
ON POS_LN.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT= POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
WHERE SCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SEL LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_POS_SCA_INCR_SC' )
AND SCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM <= '$$LastExtractDate'
AND SCA.START_TV_DTM BETWEEN ( CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '15' MINUTE) AND '$$LastExtractDate'
AND COALESCE(SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG    ,'N') = 'N' 
AND PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD = 'L'
AND SCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT BETWEEN POS_TRX.START_TV_DT AND POS_TRX.END_TV_DT
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS N_DRVD 
                 WHERE N_DRVD.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT =  SCA.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
                  AND N_DRVD.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT <> -999 )

SELECT 
POS_SCAAC_KEY,
PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      ,  
COALESCE(SC_TEAM.SHR_IND_SALESREP_NUMBER , INCR.PD_SALES_REP_NUM ) AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,       
/*COALESCE(SC_TEAM.SHR_IND_SPLIT_PERCENT * 100, INCR.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ) AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,*/
 CASE WHEN SC_TEAM.SHR_IND_SPLIT_PERCENT IS NULL THEN INCR.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ELSE (SC_TEAM.SHR_IND_SPLIT_PERCENT * INCR.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) END PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,/* modified as part of team split CR by ugandhav */
SC_ID_INT  ,           
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG   ,         
LAST_UPDATED_DTM     ,         
DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT    ,        
START_TV_DTM          ,        
END_TV_DTM            ,        
DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG       , 
POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY       ,    
NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT   ,
SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT  ,  
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
POS_RETURN_ROLE
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/  
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
,INCR.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,INCR.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,INCR.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
   /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, INCR.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, INCR.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, INCR.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, INCR.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_INC_NET_CHG_DT INCR
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OTM_PHX_SC_TEAM SC_TEAM
ON SC_TEAM.SC_ID=INCR.SC_ID_INT 
WHERE INCR.START_TV_DTM <> INCR.END_TV_DTM

SELECT
 POS_SCAAC_KEY,
 PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
 DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
 VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
 DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 SC_ID_INT,
 SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
 LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
 DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
 START_TV_DTM,
 END_TV_DTM,
    DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
    POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY ,
 CASE WHEN CAST(START_TV_DTM AS DATE ) = FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND Cast(Substr(Cast( START_TV_DTM As varchar(20)),12,19) As Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))  BETWEEN CAST ('00:00:00' AS Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))  AND CAST('23:59:59' AS Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))
   THEN CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE )
  WHEN CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE ) = FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND Cast(Substr(Cast( START_TV_DTM As varchar(20)),12,19) As Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))  BETWEEN CAST ('00:00:00' AS Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))  AND CAST('19:29:59' AS Interval Hour(2) To Second(0))
   THEN CAST ( START_TV_DTM AS DATE )
  WHEN ( CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE) > FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE) <  FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ) AND 
  ( START_TV_DTM BETWEEN CAST (CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE ) - INTERVAL '1' DAY AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) + INTERVAL '19:30' HOUR TO MINUTE AND
  (CAST(CAST(START_TV_DTM AS DATE) AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) + INTERVAL '19:30' HOUR TO MINUTE ) )
   THEN CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE )
  WHEN ( CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE) >= FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE) <  FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ) AND 
  ( START_TV_DTM BETWEEN CAST(CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE) AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) + INTERVAL '19:30' HOUR TO MINUTE AND
  CAST (CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE ) + INTERVAL '1' DAY AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) + INTERVAL '19:30' HOUR TO MINUTE )
   THEN  CAST( START_TV_DTM AS DATE ) + INTERVAL '1' DAY    
 END AS NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DATE ,
 PDC.PROCESS_DATE,
 SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
 DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
 POS_RETURN_ROLE
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/ 
 /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
    ,RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
	/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM ( 
SELECT
 POS_SCAAC_KEY,
 PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
 DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
 VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
 DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 SC_ID_INT,
 SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
 LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
 DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
 START_TV_DTM,
 END_TV_DTM,
    DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
    POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY ,
 SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
 DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
 POS_RETURN_ROLE
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/ 
    /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
    ,RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
	/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_INCR_POS WI_POS

UNION

SELECT
 POS_SCAAC_KEY,
 PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
 DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,
 VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
 DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 SC_ID_INT,
 SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
 LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
 DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
 START_TV_DTM,
 END_TV_DTM,
    DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG, 
    POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,
 SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
 DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
 POS_RETURN_ROLE
 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
 /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
    ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
    ,RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
	/* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
, AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_INCR_SC WI_SCA 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_INCR_POS WI
         WHERE WI_SCA.POS_SCAAC_KEY = WI.POS_SCAAC_KEY 
                 )
) WI , $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FDY,
(SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ) PDC
WHERE CAST(WI.START_TV_DTM AS DATE) = FDY.CALENDAR_DATE
